infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WholeFoodLabs uses the camera to scan barcodes and capture product labels.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WholeFoodLabs uses your photo library so you can attach ingredient and nutrition label photos.
